title: MENTORING - 211info
text: BAMBINOS OREGON MENTORING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Mentoring program with Christian women. 322 Main Street Suite 200 Dallas, OR 97338 Eligibility: Women Hours: Monday/Thursday 9am-noon, Tuesday 12pm-6pm, 1st and 3rd Saturday of the month 1pm-4pm Email (503) 623-4618 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 623-4618 Main phone Main phone (503) 623-4618 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof that dependant child resides at the same address as client applying (WIC, OHP card, TANF, etc.) AREA SERVED: Benton, Linn, Marion, Polk, and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday/Thursday 9am-noon, Wednesday 3pm-6pm, 1st and 3rd Saturday of the month 1pm-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in Main Street Plaza, lower level. Next door to Food Bank. Services: Mentoring Programs * Women Other Services Offered At This Location: MATERIAL GOODS - BASIC NEEDS SUPPLIES MATERIAL GOODS - NEW BABY GIFTS PUBLIC SAFETY - CHILD SAFETY EQUIPMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
